steps.title: Read the contrast
steps.content: The phrase "but are also" signals that residential choices involve noneconomic factors in addition to spending power. The blank needs a phrase meaning shaped or influenced by.

steps.title: Choose the influence phrase
steps.content: Choice A suggests switching things around. Choice C suggests separation. Choice D suggests one thing comes earlier than another. The phrase "mediated by" fits because it shows noneconomic factors shaping residential location choices. The answer is B.
